name: harness
description: Multi-agent sprint orchestration harness with three-plugin architecture: domain-blind core, SDLC domain skill suite, and sales domain skill suite.

interface.longDescription: Runs an Anthropic-style application harness with 6 agents: initializer, planner, generator, evaluator, coordinator, and releaser. Domain-blind core with pluggable domain skill suites. Includes the SDLC suite for software delivery and the Sales suite for revenue execution.
defaultPrompt: Build an app using the harness.
Review whether this harness really followed the sprint plan.
Run continuous multi-agent app delivery until done.
